refactorPlan.title: Rename COMFYUI_PINNED_REF to COMFYUI_PINNED_TAG
refactorPlan.description: Rename the module-level constant COMFYUI_PINNED_REF to COMFYUI_PINNED_TAG in _runtime.py (also update COMFYUI_PINNED_ARCHIVE_URL f-string). Update all references in tests/test_runtime_autodownload.py from _runtime.COMFYUI_PINNED_REF to _runtime.COMFYUI_PINNED_TAG.

refactorPlan.title: Fix stale _runtime_not_found error message
refactorPlan.description: Update the _runtime_not_found helper to produce a message that reflects the auto-download context ('ComfyUI runtime bootstrap failed.') rather than the old 'Run: git submodule update --init' instruction which no longer applies as primary guidance.

refactorPlan.title: Have ensure_comfyui_on_path() call ensure_comfyui_available()
refactorPlan.description: Call ensure_comfyui_available() at the start of ensure_comfyui_on_path() so direct callers (not going through check_runtime) also trigger the bootstrap automatically.
